global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a streamlined body and predominantly white plumage. It features a light gray back and wings, a distinctive black ring around its yellow bill, and yellow legs. The wings have black tips with white spots, and the eyes are dark with a red orbital ring.
discriminative_attributes: Dark eyes with red orbital ring

part_details.bill: Short, yellow with a black ring near the tip.
part_details.wings: Long, light gray with black tips and white spots.
part_details.eyes: Dark with a red orbital ring.
part_details.plumage: Predominantly white with light gray on back and wings.

spatial_relations: The black ring encircles the yellow bill near the tip.
The light gray wings extend from the sides of the white body.
The black-tipped wings have white spots at the ends.
The yellow legs are positioned under the body.
